intro:
Beginning Fall 2026, CIS course subjects have changed to CSC or CIT. Impacted students, check your Sinclair e-mail for more information or meet with your academic advisor.

Course testing may require the use of Respondus Lockdown Browser or access to a webcam and microphone for use with Respondus Monitor.
